---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Propose a capability or improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / job-to-be-done**
What are you trying to do that JARVIS can't do today?

**Proposed approach (if you have one)**
How might it work? If it touches actions, sensors, or the network, note how it fits the project's
invariants (model-proposes/code-disposes, content-blind sensors, local-first, consent-gated mutation —
see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)).

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to solve it, and why this one.

**Scope check**
Is this a small, well-scoped change or a larger architectural one? Larger ones will need an ADR — happy
to discuss the design in this issue first.
